mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user WHERE is_delete = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalOrders, SUM(CASE WHEN paid = 1 AND order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'REFUNDED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS paidOrders, SUM(CASE WHEN paid = 1 AND order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'REFUNDED') THEN pay_amount ELSE 0 END) AS totalAmount, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN paid = 1 AND order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'REFUNDED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN paid = 1 AND order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'REFUNDED') THEN pay_amount ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN paid = 1 AND order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'REFUNDED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) END AS averageAmount FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) AS refundCount, IFNULL(SUM(refund_amount), 0) AS refundAmount FROM mall_after_sale WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND after_sale_status IN ('APPROVED', 'PROCESSING', 'COMPLETED')

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, #{groupFormat}) AS label, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, IFNULL(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS orderAmount FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND paid = 1 AND order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'REFUNDED') AND create_time >= #{startTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, #{groupFormat}) ORDER BY label
SELECT order_status AS status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY order_status

SELECT pay_type AS payType, COUNT(*) AS count, IFNULL(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS amount FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND paid = 1 AND order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'REFUNDED') GROUP BY pay_type

SELECT moi.product_id AS productId, mp.name AS productName, SUM(moi.quantity) AS quantity, IFNULL(SUM(moi.total_price), 0) AS amount FROM mall_order_item moi INNER JOIN mall_order mo ON moi.order_id = mo.id INNER JOIN mall_product mp ON moi.product_id = mp.id WHERE mo.is_deleted = 0 AND mp.is_deleted = 0 AND mo.paid = 1 AND mo.order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'REFUNDED') GROUP BY moi.product_id, mp.name ORDER BY quantity DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT sold.product_id AS productId, sold.product_name AS productName, sold.sold_quantity AS soldQuantity, IFNULL(ret.return_qty, 0) AS returnQuantity FROM (SELECT moi.product_id, moi.product_name, SUM(moi.quantity) AS sold_quantity FROM mall_order_item moi INNER JOIN mall_order mo ON moi.order_id = mo.id WHERE mo.is_deleted = 0 AND mo.paid = 1 AND mo.order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'REFUNDED') GROUP BY moi.product_id, moi.product_name) sold LEFT JOIN (SELECT moi.product_id, SUM(moi.quantity) AS return_qty FROM mall_after_sale mas INNER JOIN mall_order_item moi ON mas.order_item_id = moi.id WHERE mas.is_deleted = 0 AND mas.after_sale_status IN ('APPROVED', 'PROCESSING', 'COMPLETED') GROUP BY moi.product_id) ret ON sold.product_id = ret.product_id ORDER BY returnQuantity DESC LIMIT #{limit}
